title: GOP incumbents sweep Oklahoma U.S. House primary elections
shortDescription: The results are in: Republican incumbents win their respective primaries in Oklahoma congressional races

title: Will Donald Trump pick Doug Burgum as his running mate? Website fuels VP speculation
shortDescription: The trumpburgum.com website was redirecting to Donald Trump's office campaign site Thursday, inviting speculation that Doug Burgum is the VP pick.

title: Supreme Court saves controversial Trump-era tax on Americans' foreign earnings
shortDescription: A major change in tax laws signed by Trump in 2017 had a one-time tax on foreign earnings for some investors.

title: 'AI Steve' candidate on UK election ballot
shortDescription: Businessman Steve Endacott is using an AI generated avatar as the face of his campaign in the July 4 national election to join Britain's parliament.

title: Key House chair Tom Cole wins 'bar fight' of a GOP primary in Oklahoma
shortDescription: U.S. Rep. Tom Cole won what he called a 'bar fight' against a well-funded challenger to win the GOP primary for the Fourth Congressional District.

title: Fauci on how COVID (and Trump) helped him become a hero and a villain
shortDescription: Exclusive: At 83, the public-health doc at the center of battles against diseases from AIDS to Zika weighs in on COVID-19, and Donald Trump.

title: Tulsi Gabbard wants to serve under Donald Trump, but do their policies align?
shortDescription: Tulsi Gabbard says that she would be "honored" to serve as Trump's VP and is also eyeing a Cabinet job. But how much does she have in common with him?

title: Women must register for draft? Bill not signed into law | Fact check
shortDescription: Though a Senate committee approved a bill that would require women to register for the Selective Service the bill is still far from becoming law.

title: Takeaways from Donald Trump's Wisconsin campaign rally
shortDescription: Donald Trump riffed on the Milwaukee "horrible city" controversy, ripped Biden on border security and noted Lake Michigan's lack of sharks.

title: Biden needs to win these swing states in November
shortDescription: Which three Rust Belt states are make-or-break for the Democrats and the November election?

title: Biden immigration rule for undocumented spouses
shortDescription: Immigrants who are married to U.S. citizens but are in the country illegally would be protected under the Biden administration's sweeping new program.

title: Trump campaign disputes report he will stay in Chicago during RNC
shortDescription: A Trump campaign spokesperson said the former president would be staying in Milwaukee for the RNC that will take place downtown July 15-18.

title: Senate Democrats want to restore a Trump-era bump stock ban. The push failed.
shortDescription: The Supreme Court ruling Friday overturned a Trump-era policy that had bipartisan support.

title: Trump's agenda if he wins in November, from energy to education
shortDescription: A look at former President Donald Trump's plans if he wins a second term in November.

title: Men 18-25 not being drafted; bill is misrepresented | Fact check
shortDescription: The bill would automatically register men ages 18-25 for the Selective Service. Men in this age group are already legally required to register.

title: Melania Trump scheduled to hold fundraiser for Log Cabin Republicans
shortDescription: Former First Lady Melania Trump is scheduled to hold a second fundraiser on July 8 for the Log Cabin Republicans.

title: Ethics Committee expands sweeping investigation into Matt Gaetz
shortDescription: The Florida lawmaker is under investigation for alleged sexual misconduct, illicit drug use and more.
